backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report tracking two completed features: removing the 'Licensed & Insured' badge from navigation/About, and removing all 'fully licensed, bonded, and insured' text from About and Hero components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend file's purpose and the specific changes made, including contrast improvements, badge removals, and text color updates across all components.
frontend/index.css: Defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color system, including background, foreground, primary, muted, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app with a root div and a module script pointing to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app component that assembles the single-page layout by composing Navigation, Hero, Services, About, Contact, and Footer components.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section displaying company story, founder quote, highlights grid, and trust badges — with 'Licensed & Insured' and licensing/bonding/insurance badges removed, leaving only 'Background Checked' and '20+ Yrs Experience'.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a free quote CTA, email display, phone link, and contact info cards for phone, email, service area, and hours.
frontend/src/components/CustomizationPro: Empty file — the CustomizationPrompt component has been removed with no remaining content.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Multi-column footer with brand info, quick links, services list, business hours, and a bottom bar — all text styled in dark ink colors on a light background.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with headline, tagline, CTA buttons, and stats — the 'Licensed & Insured Professionals' badge has been removed.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive fixed navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, a mobile hamburger menu, and a 'Get a Quote' CTA button that scrolls to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Services section displaying an 8-item grid of handyman offerings (plumbing, electrical, carpentry, etc.) with icons, descriptions, and a Philadelphia-to-New-Jersey service area banner.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Oswald and Inter fonts, defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for the design system (orange, snow, ink palette), and utility classes like section-title.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom color palettes (orange, ink, snow), typography/container-queries/animate plugins, custom shadows, and accordion/fade-in keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, existing completed features (removing 'Licensed & Insured' badges), and a pending action request to remove those same elements from the page.
